requirements.requirement_text: The BCM shall transmit the current hazard light status on the CAN bus.
When the headlight state changes, the BCM shall transmit the updated headlight status on the CAN bus.
The BCM shall transmit the current door lock status on the CAN bus.
The BCM shall transmit whether the trunk is open or closed on the CAN bus.
The BCM shall transmit the interior light level (in percentage) on the CAN bus.
The BCM shall transmit the current windshield wiper speed setting on the CAN bus.
The ECM shall transmit the current vehicle speed on the CAN bus.
When the driver presses the horn switch, the IC shall immediately transmit the horn switch status on the CAN bus.
When the driver requests high beam, the IC shall transmit the high beam switch request on the CAN bus.
